issues.title: QuestionAnswerAdvisor: Augmentation of the user prompt with document context fails with structured output

comments.body: This is similar to what I mentioned in #2961 (see last comment). It was suggested to use a different delimiter so that the template renderer does not  fail with JSON.

@ThomasVitale Is this already fixed? Setting '<' and '>' as the delimiter token for the ChatClient and Advisor works, but the structured output feature should from my perspective  work in combination with the QuestionAnswerAdvisor, without any customizations.

Hi @timosalm, thank you for reporting. It is a regression and @ThomasVitale has already fixed via https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/2963 Please use the snapshot to verify and re-open if you still see the issue.
